name: flow-office php
postCreateCommand: cd backend && composer install && if [ ! -f .env ]; then cp .env.example .env && sed -i 's/^MICROSOFT_MOCK_ENABLED=.*/MICROSOFT_MOCK_ENABLED=true/' .env && sed -i 's#^MICROSOFT_MOCK_INTERNAL_BASE_URL=.*#MICROSOFT_MOCK_INTERNAL_BASE_URL=http://mock-oidc:9000#' .env && sed -i 's/^MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID=$/MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID=mock-client-id/' .env && sed -i 's/^MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET=$/MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET=mock-client-secret/' .env && sed -i 's/^MICROSOFT_TENANT_ID=.*/MICROSOFT_TENANT_ID=mock/' .env; fi && php artisan key:generate && if [ ! -f database/database.sqlite ]; then touch database/database.sqlite; fi && cd ../frontend && npm install
postStartCommand: echo 'Use: cd backend && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000 (別ターミナルで cd frontend && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0)'; echo 'Mock Entra ID login: http://localhost:9000 (backend/.envのMICROSOFT_MOCK_ENABLED=trueで有効)'
